                  "lineNumber": 2425,
                  "content": "The sidebar navigation handles external links differently from internal routes.                 {
                  "lineNumber": 2486,
                  "content": "  - For simulation runs, a special &#96;notFoundHeader&#96; is used that shows empty header and navigates back to &#96;/simulations&#96; (main page) instead of the specific simulation"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2492,
                  "content": "- **Multiple date formats**: When creating optimistic UI updates (e.g., adding a pending run to a table), use &#96;new Date().toISOString()&#96; which produces &#96;\"2026-01-18T09:30:00.000Z\"&#96;. The &#96;formatRelativeTime&#96; helper in &#96;TestsTabContent.tsx&#96; handles both formats - check if the string already has a timezone indicator before appending \"Z\" to avoid invalid dates like &#96;\"...ZZ\"&#96; which produce NaN"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2504,
                  "content": "  - Example: &#96;TestsTabContent&#96; uses &#96;viewingTestResultsRef&#96;, &#96;viewingBenchmarkResultsRef&#96;, &#96;selectedPastRunRef&#96;, and &#96;pastRunsRef&#96; to check current state inside polling callbacks"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2509,
                  "content": "  - Example: &#96;TestsTabContent&#96; uses &#96;pastRunsRef&#96; instead of having &#96;pastRuns&#96; in the polling useEffect dependencies"

                  "content": "### Navigation"

                  "lineNumber": 2634,

                  "lineNumber": 2638,

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I found the relevant code. Looking at lines 1321-1337, the message bubble for agent and user messages uses a single-line `<input>` element:

```tsx
{/* Message Bubble - for agent and user messages */}
{(message.role === "agent" || message.role === "user") && (
  <div className="w-1/2">
    <input
      type="text"
      value={message.content}
      onChange={(e) =>
        updateChatMessage(message.id, e.target.value)
      }
      className={`w-full px-4 py-2 rounded-xl text-sm text-foreground border focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent ${
        message.role === "agent"
          ? "bg-background border-border"
          : "bg-accent border-border"
      }`}
    />
  </div>
)}
```

To make it multi-line, I should change the `<input type="text">` to a `<textarea>` element that expands as the content grows. I can use CSS to make it auto-resize or use a controlled height approach.

The user wants the message bubbles to become multi-line as the text keeps increasing. I'll change the input to a textarea and make it expand with content.</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The change is complete. I replaced the single-line `<input type="text">` with a `<textarea>` that:
1. Starts with `rows={1}` for a single line initially
2. Has `resize-none` and `overflow-hidden` classes to prevent manual resizing and hide the scrollbar
3. Uses `onChange` and `onInput` handlers to auto-resize as content changes
4. Uses a `ref` callback to auto-resize on mount (for when editing existing tests)

This will make the message bubbles expand vertically as the user types more text.</details></think>

---

Done. I've updated the conversation history message bubbles in the AddTestDialog to use multi-line `<textarea>` elements that automatically expand as text increases. The textareas:

1. Start with a single line height
2. Automatically grow as you type more text
3. Resize properly when content is pasted
4. Also resize correctly when editing an existing test (on initial load)

                  "content": "  - **Stable audio keys**: All audio elements use &#96;key={audioUrl}&#96; to prevent React from remounting them during polling re-renders (avoids audio restart/reload)",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 456,
                  "content": "  - **Presigned URL refresh on error**: Audio elements include &#96;onError={refreshRunData}&#96; handler to automatically fetch fresh presigned URLs when they expire. The &#96;refreshRunData&#96; callback clears &#96;frozenSimulationRef&#96; before updating state so new URLs are used instead of stale frozen data",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 457,
                  "content": "  - Full conversation audio player below header (from &#96;conversation_wav_url&#96;) for voice simulations",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },

                  "lineNumber": 458,

                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1071,
                  "content": "3. **Modal Dialogs**: Centered overlays for confirmations and simple forms",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1072,
                  "content": "   - Simple dialogs: Backdrop click closes dialog directly",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1073,
                  "content": "   - Form dialogs with unsaved data: Backdrop click shows confirmation before closing (e.g., AddTestDialog)"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1074,
                  "content": "   - Used for: New agent, New simulation, Delete confirmations, Add/Edit test",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1075,
                  "content": "   - **Large form dialogs** (like AddTestDialog): Use a header bar with name input and save button, flex-col layout with main content area below"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1076,
                  "content": "4. **Delete Confirmation**: Reusable &#96;DeleteConfirmationDialog&#96; component",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 1077,

                  "lineNumber": 2366,
                  "isContextLine": true

                  "lineNumber": 2544,
                  "content": "  - **Gotcha**: Without clearing at the start of the effect, re-renders or dependency changes can create multiple concurrent intervals, causing excessive API requests",

                },

                  "lineNumber": 2545,
                  "content": "- **Dialog close prevention**: Disable dialog close while async operations (delete, save) are in progress",
                  "isContextLine": true
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2546,
                  "content": "- **Unsaved changes confirmation**: Form dialogs (like AddTestDialog) should show a confirmation dialog when user clicks backdrop, asking \"Discard changes?\" with Cancel/Discard buttons"
                },
                {
                  "lineNumber": 2547,
                  "content": "- **Key-based lookup with freeze-on-complete for live-updating dialogs**: When a dialog shows data that can complete (e.g., transcript with audio):",

                  "lineNumber": 2548,
